case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. JIN LI

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LI, JIN $4,786.07 PRINCIPAL, $249.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,035.57, SEE SCANNED DOC
